title: KandyToys SupeRetro Metal Magic Spring | Kids Slinky Toy | Metal Slinky | Retro Toys
features: KandyToys Retro Metal Magic Spring - Made from high quality durable metal this slinky will let you relive the experience of one of the best toys from the 90s.
Hours Of Fun - With a diameter of 7cm and a coiled height of 7cm, this slinky is great as it's super stretchy and can twist those bored moods into enjoyable moments.
Unlimited Tricks - Let the slinky do it's part and show off it's skills walking down the stairs and other elevated levels, the visual performance is amazing.
Excellent Gift Idea - This toy makes a great stocking and party bag filler, the fun retro design gift box it comes in will make anyone happy to receive one.
description: Product Description KandyToys Metal Magic Spring. A classic retro toy, great for tactile play. The Spring is 7cm coiled in height. Makes a great stocking and party bag filler in fun retro design gift box. Suitable for Ages 6+. Directions 1. Hold the slinky at the top. 2. Let it walk down stairs or other elevated levels. 3. Watch it stretch, snap back, and perform various tricks. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. See more
